summary: Complete testing of Agency OS - Supabase migration. Backend API (19/19 tests passed) and Frontend UI tested with Playwright

ui_bugs.issue: Yellow background color visible on input fields and table areas (CSS cache issue mentioned by main agent)

integration_issues.issue: Nav item 'İçerik' click timeout - possible page loading race condition. Other 8/9 nav items work correctly

issues: Missing aria-describedby warning in DialogContent (accessibility improvement needed)

action_items: Optional: Investigate yellow background CSS cache issue on AdminClients page (low priority - mentioned as known issue)
Optional: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code well-structured with proper Supabase integration
All auth endpoints working correctly with Supabase JWT validation
CRUD operations for clients, receipts, services all functional

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Login, Dashboard, Clients, Receipts, Navigation all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase migration complete and working. Backend API 100% functional. Frontend navigation and CRUD operations verified. Yellow background CSS issue is known non-critical bug (CSS cache). Admin login with admin@agency.com/admin123 working.

backend: GET /api/receipts - List receipts with client names ✓
